reviews.review_description: Great game! Just a few requests. I think there should be more stencils such as a straight line and a circle that can be placed and not just held. I also think a tunnel or skatepark map could be cool! More ways to paint in the future such as flicking to create dots and using a brush to get different effects could be cool projects later in development as well.

developer_response.body: Noted! Thanks for the stars!

reviews.review_title: Going great until the game signed me out
reviews.review_description:
Newest edit: they fixed the bug, I can play like before with no issue.


Edit: they reached out and offered to help me through discord however I'm to lazy to do all of that so I'm just going to create a new account on a different email.


Tried playing the game today and for whatever reason it logged me out? I forgot the password to my account so I tried using my email but nothing showed up there, Apparently all my progress and art is just gone now

developer_response.body: Glad you're back in to your original account. :)

reviews.review_description: Been playing this on my quest 2 works OK except if you climb to much you end up flying but you can work around climbing easy, love the game the idea is amazing and it saves me a criminal record, use to go out painting got busted a few times and stopped but this threw me back in to it all again without having to go out at stupid times and risk my freedom, amazing game highly recommend ***** 5star all the way

developer_response.body: Thanks Bear. Means a lot!

reviews.review_description:
This is an amazing game but it just logged me out for zero reason and now I can’t get back in and play.

update: as a response to the devs response… it still doesn’t work, so word of advice, don’t make us put in our email to play and just let us play without an annoying log in process.

Got my vr set and i saw that game. Man i remember when i was a kid and we speak about something like that, but it wasnt possible then (Windows xp times). Nowadays i dont paint no more but bigup for the work that u doing guys. Great stuff

With that being said, I've tried several times to reset my password and there is no email sent to me to reset it. My only solution is to create a new account and lose all of my previous data. reviews.review_description: pretty good to relax and express the artistic part of your mind, some things that i found boring is there is only one map, i'd think that having multiple maps (even if they look bad when released) wiuld be a BIG step up, but overall i like it

Add a setting to move around be gripping the direction you would want to go because I can’t do anything because I’m constantly moving around. Like let me fully turn of smooth/snap turn it’s so fkn annoying.

developer_response.body:
Yeah, this is a controller stick drift issue, not really an issue with Vandalizer itself 😭 so a 1★ review on the game feels a bit unfair.

You can usually improve stick drift by increasing the controller deadzone in your Quest settings, give that a go.

We’re a tiny team and put loads of work into Vandalizer, so it sucks getting hit for something that’s normally caused by worn Quest controllers rather than the game itself.

reviews.review_description: I love the game bc of the creators thanks for at least keeping me up and going unlike one game”downshot”AHEM but thank you really for keeping me up and running

developer_response.body: Thanks for the 5* and we're chuffed you love it :)

reviews.review_description: This got me into drawing and painting, thanks a bunch dudes!

I love this game, its amazing, fun, and relaxing. One thing i would like to see is paint dripping, and multiplayer. Other than that, super fun and realistic. Maby more stencils would be nice. But if I could go higher than 5 stars, I would.

reviews.review_title: Needs some work, but has great potential
reviews.review_description: I would love to leave a more in depth review, but I have not had the chance to properly play the game, as I have horrible stick drift. Usually this can be easily solved by just changing the movement from right to left, unfortunately this game does not have that simple mechanic, which has made the game very hard to play. I also can’t really figure out how to delete things? Idk. Please add switching the movement sticks 🙏

Was pretty confusing at first but got the hang of it the more i played. Not better than graffism but since its free, its good. Obviously the more expensive one is usally better but  if you cant really afford graffism you should TOTTALY give this game a try. Overall pretty good game for free.  Lots of potential. Hope this game gets more maps instead of the truck only.

developer_response.body:
Have you pushed the menu button? There are 16 objects in there right now. 

Thanks for the stars!

reviews.review_description: I truly love this game sm and I'm looking forward to play this more and more often. The only thing i ask is to include paint brushes and multiplayer, because my friend and i love this game and would like to play together. Thanks so much for making a great game!

developer_response.body: Thanks Monkey for the 5* and we're currently building multiplayer

reviews.review_description: This is best free spraying I've played in my life, it got unique mechanic like able to spray any spot of the object, but it needs more works like adding able to favorite your color, fixing the turning smooth, or quick pick color from the color you sprayed on wall, overall it's great game
Game is great the physics are pretty realistic, ￼some small things here and there aren’t perfect but overall very good.

It's amazing but sometimes when I try to move it flings me out the map so I have to keep closing it and opening back up and another one is I can't spray while I'm moving please make either a setting or built into the game so that you can paint while moving so you don't mess it up when attempting to move while painting
It logged me out the day after playing it and when i went to sign in again it kept saying connection timed out so i tried to make a new account but it wouldn't let me register

developer_response.body: We are taking this bug out - sorry you had this experience! Give us some time, we'll fix this! Thanks

reviews.review_description: Bro tysm for this game its not only fun but it has improved my Real life graffiti growth a TON it makes me remember the feel of my tag making it smooth and clean TYSMMMM. Also i forgot to add but as a real graffiti artist myself I love that this is free bc it helps alot and I alr spend so much on markers and spray cans so having a game to practice my artwork and i dont have to spend any money. I was looking for a graffiti game on vr because I needed to practice and I. was ready to spend money on the other ones when I saw an add on Tiktok and I was curious I clicked the page and I saw that it was free gave it a try now my fav game to play Devs tysm One thing even though the game just came out this is for the future ofc it would be cool to add dripping  from the paint not alot ofc but only if you add to much in one spot once again devs Tysm.

developer_response.body:
Hey! Reading this makes me rrrreally happy, we worked hard on this. The dripping is in there, but we temporarily removed it because it was still a bit buggy. 

On it! 

Enjoy - and make sure to share your work on our Discord! 

https://discord.gg/gFM7GPVSsf

reviews.review_description: How is this game free? It's so cool, you have a ton of options for things you can spray on, different nozzles and textures of the spray itself. You get the hang of it pretty quickly and you lose track of time once you start a piece. Love the game 10/10
Really great for a free game and works well on its first release date. Love that we can paint on so many different 3d objects. I hope they add multiplayer soon so I can play with my friends.

developer_response.body: That's so nice of you! Enjoy painting, enjoy collecting.
